scripts.generate:openapi: python -c "import json,sys;from pathlib import Path;api_root=Path('apps/api').resolve();sys.path.insert(0,str(api_root));from app.main import app;Path('apps/api/openapi.json').write_text(json.dumps(app.openapi(), indent=2), encoding='utf-8')"
scripts.contracts:sync: pnpm run generate:openapi && pnpm run generate:types
